app.title: Sub Creator
app.subtitle: Designed and dynamic subtitles for Premiere Pro 2025+
gallery.empty: No MOGRT found for this filter.
premiere.noneFound: No .srt subtitle file found in the Premiere project
help.premiereCaptionSource: Lists subtitle files already imported in the Premiere project (.srt).
help.whisper: Whisper must be installed locally and available via the `whisper` command.
help.tracks: Video track = target destination for inserted MOGRT (0=V1). Audio track is required by Premiere importMGT API (0=A1).
error.emptySrt: The SRT file contains no valid subtitle cues.
error.invalidPremiereCaption: Selected Premiere caption source is not a valid SRT file.
error.missingWhisperAudio: Select an audio/video file for Whisper.
error.emptyWhisper: Whisper did not return usable subtitles.
error.transcriptionUnavailable: Active transcription is currently unavailable. Use SRT source mode.
error.mogrtCatalogMissing: MOGRT catalog missing. Run npm run subcreator:build and reinstall the extension.
